title: SimulationCase entity (ONT-E-13)
description: A specific CFD simulation case (geometry + method + mesh + turbulence + boundary conditions + results summary). References NASA Turbulence Modeling Resource (https://tmbwg.github.io/turbmodels/), ERCOFTAC Classic Database, and AIAA Drag/High-Lift/Aeroelastic Prediction Workshops as v0.1.0 reference_url targets. Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties — Pitfall #1). Ties together CFDMethod (cfd_method_ref, required), MeshRequirement (mesh_ref, optional), and TurbulenceModel (turbulence_model_ref, optional) via canonical aviationkb:// URIs. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. MUST be the literal string 'SimulationCase'.

target_geometry.description: Free-text geometry identifier (e.g. 'NACA-0012 airfoil at AoA 5deg', 'CRM wing-body, M=0.85, Re=5e6', 'flat-plate boundary-layer, Re_x=1e7').

cfd_method_ref.description: Required canonical URI to the CFDMethod entity used for this case (e.g. aviationkb://cfdmethod/rans-steady@1).

mesh_ref.description: Optional canonical URI to the MeshRequirement entity describing the case mesh (e.g. aviationkb://mesh/cfd-2d-airfoil-fine@1).

turbulence_model_ref.description: Optional canonical URI to the TurbulenceModel entity used (e.g. aviationkb://turb/k-omega-sst@1).

type.description: Boundary condition type. wall (no-slip / slip / moving); inlet (velocity / total-pressure); outlet (pressure / outflow); symmetry; periodic; far_field (Riemann / characteristic); internal_interface (sliding / mixing-plane / GGI); other = escape hatch.

specification.description: Optional free-text specification (e.g. 'velocity 50 m/s, AoA 5deg, k=0.001, omega=1.0', 'static pressure 101325 Pa').

boundary_conditions.description: Optional list of boundary conditions defining the case.

results_summary.description: Optional free-text summary of validation outcome / key results (≥20 chars). Empty / placeholder summaries fail validation by design.

reference_url.description: Optional external reference URL. PREFERRED targets per CLAUDE.md project stack: NASA Turbulence Modeling Resource (https://tmbwg.github.io/turbmodels/), ERCOFTAC Classic Database, or AIAA Drag/High-Lift/Aeroelastic Prediction Workshop case entry. Phase 4 demo data must populate this field for any case sourced from these databases (T-02-06-02 mitigation).
